We currently export to the Netherlands, Greece, Italy, and Spain.

Impact of the Red Sea Situation:
Due to the ongoing Red Sea crisis, the shipment of reefer containers from India to Europe now involves a significantly longer voyage time, which is impacting our overall shipping schedule.

Seasonal Shipment Feasibility:
Long-voyage shipments are undertaken only during the fresh harvest season, typically from January to April / early May, as onions harvested during this period are strong and suitable for extended transit.

Off-Season Limitation:
Outside this harvest window, Indian onions are less robust and not suitable for long voyages, which may affect shipment feasibility.

White Onion Harvest:
In addition to Red and Pink onions, we also supply White onions (sizes 50–70 mm & 60–80 mm). The harvest for White onions also begins in January.

Next Steps:
We will keep you updated once the new harvest begins and the quality is ready for export. | Unnamed: 75: 3.12.25 -- commission mark up and supplier onboarding process flow sent | Unnamed: 76: follow up email sent
